channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → COMCAST : Occupy territory (Petersburg, Sankt-Peterburg, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: RUSSIA / COMCAST. Location: Petersburg, Sankt-Peterburg, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → GAZA : Violate ceasefire (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: ISRAEL / GAZA. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] nan → ISRAEL : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Isfiya, H_efa, Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: nan / ISRAEL. Location: Isfiya, H_efa, Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] PRESIDENT → UNIVERSITY : Demonstrate or rally (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: PRESIDENT / UNIVERSITY. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] nan → IRAN : Torture (Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Torture. Actors: nan / IRAN. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 14 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] IRAN → IRAQ : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: IRAN / IRAQ. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → PRISON : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Rostov-On-Don, Rostovskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: RUSSIA / PRISON. Location: Rostov-On-Don, Rostovskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / LEBANON. Location: Jerusalem, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.
